opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These rough, ugly lumps are spreading all over my fingers, and they hurt every time I try to type or hold a pen.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Rough lumps are spreading on my fingers and hurting near the nails — I'm worried it's serious.

symptom_narrative.character: rough dome-shaped hyperkeratotic lumps, some near the nails, tiny black dots
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: backs of my hands and fingers, some near the nails
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: disrupted skin lines, tiny black splinters inside; NO systemic symptoms; not ulcerated/bleeding on its own/irregularly pigmented

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; has been picking at the lesions (autoinoculation)

objective_data_offered.value: several rough dome-shaped verrucous papules on hands/fingers with disrupted skin lines and tiny black dots, visible on video
no ulceration, no irregular pigment, no spontaneous bleeding, no fast growth
